notes: Maintainer confirmed the event shell. News sources confirm the two-day run at Taipei International Convention Center; no exact public video was found in this pass. Setlist recovered 2026-06-28 from the official VCD release tracklist (美丽邂逅演唱会, douban music subject 1458145). The released VCD documents 22 tracks across two discs; the full concert also included 一條日光大道, 春天的浮雕, and 佛歌 大吉祥天女咒 per Epoch Times news coverage, but those are not on the VCD. Wind flower is a duet with 周华健.

title: Cloud

setlist.titlePerformed: Santa Claus Is Coming to Town

setlist.notes: Cover of 梅艷芳.

notes: Maintainer confirmed the shell and rejected YouTube QvOnod7ZS7Y as a news clip, not performance media. Small Live House concert, ~90 minutes, nearly 20 songs. Setlist recovered 2026-06-28 from an attendee review (Pixnet blog by ned921, 2012-02-11, https://ned921.pixnet.net/blog/posts/4036302726). The review is impressionistic and does not give a confirmed order; positions are approximate, in the review's mention order. The reviewer notes the ~90-minute set leaned heavily on The Voice and 雲端 album religious/English songs plus early folk hits; ~20 songs total per news, so this partial list (~13) is incomplete. Omitted songs per the reviewer include 走在雨中, 春天的故事, 你是我所有的回憶, 九月的高跟鞋, 一條日光大道, Stories, Whoever finds this I love you.
